options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <out_file> # Name of output name mapping file

options.name: -bbox_pins
options.description: If true, writes out bbox pins, if false, write out bbox

options.name: -enable_one_to_one_mapping
options.description: If true, only one of the clone will be printed in the mapping file.

options.name: -hdl
options.description: Enable the generation of name mapping from current names to names defined by 'hdl_name' attribute.

options.name: -hierarchical
options.description: Specify if write out other post boundary optimizations mapping.

options.name: -include_new_iterms
options.description: When the value is set as true, the output mapping file will write out the updated items as well as "new added iterms" that exists in innovus but not in input mapping file.

options.name: -initial
options.description: Enable the generation of name mapping from current names to names defined by 'initial_name' attribute.

options.name: -input_mapping_file
options.description: When provided Tool will read existing mapping file and write out updated mapping file.

options.name: -map_pins
options.description: Specify type of sequential pins to write out, defaut is input.

options.name: -pin_polarity
options.description: Specify if write out polarity information.

options.name: -print_deleted
options.description: If user specifies the option or provide value as true then mapping file will also print deleted instances. Default False

options.name: -report_power_format
options.description: Specify if write out power replay format, if false, write out default format with 'add mapped point'.

options.name: -skip_clock_gate
options.description: Filter out ICGs which are not in RTL, default true.

options.name: -updated_only
options.description: It skips printing any pin which does not have any change/update during optimizations/flow.
